title: NeuronCompanionTelemetryEvent
description: Structured telemetry event emitted by the Neuron companion (F0038-S0008). Establishes the baseline 'needs-attention surfaced -> draft-ready' duration (no baseline exists today) plus the minimal secondary v1 set (DAU for the renewal-owner persona, % attention-flagged actioned, drafts generated / mock-sent). Modeled on the F0035 SessionContinuityEvent ingest pattern (ADR-024). Fire-and-forget: emission failure MUST NOT break the user flow. PII boundary: carries only the stable internal user_id plus thread/renewal correlation ids and metric fields — never draft body content, raw prompts, credentials, email, name, or IP.

event_name.description: needs-attention-surfaced (primary start) and draft-ready (primary end) bracket the baseline metric; the rest are the minimal secondary v1 set. Edit-distance and compliance-violation tracking are explicitly deferred.

user_id.description: Stable internal UserId per ADR-006; IdP-agnostic, safe to log.

renewal_id.description: Renewal correlation. The same renewal_id correlates needs-attention-surfaced (start) and draft-ready (end) to compute the duration; a surfaced renewal with no paired draft-ready is measurable as 'not actioned' (no fabricated end timestamp).

persona.description: Renewal-owner persona context for DAU; required on companion-daily-active.
